name: Sausage-Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Lb. mild bulk pork sausage, cooked, crumbled and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tops from tomatoes; scoop out pulp, leaving shells intact.
2. Chop pulp.
3. Combine tomato pulp, bread crumbs, celery, green pepper, basil and cooked sausage; mix well.
4. Sprinkle inside of tomato shells with salt and pepper.
5. Arrange tomatoes in an 8-inch square baking pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes or until tomatoes are thoroughly heated.
7. Sprinkle tomatoes with cheese.
8. Bake 1 additional minute or until cheese melts.
